phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Manuelino portal is
phrases.cultural_note: Portal Manuelino é um elemento arquitetónico distintivo da igreja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the parish office is
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica a secretaria da paróquia?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH sehk-rih-tuh-REEUH DUH puh-RAW-keeuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff handle administrative requests and historical document consultations.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou voluntário da paróquia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo DUH puh-RAW-keeuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or a parish volunteer.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or a parish volunteer.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo DUH puh-RAW-keeuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou voluntário da paróquia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the parish office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secretaria da paróquia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH sehk-rih-tuh-REEUH DUH puh-RAW-keeuh?
phrases.cultural_note: A secretaria trata de pedidos e certidões.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao pároco.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW PAH-roo-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the church caretaker or the parish priest.

responses.english: Ask the church caretaker or the parish priest.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW PAH-roo-koo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao pároco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Manuelino portal is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente o portal manuelino?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AW poo-ruh-TAHL muh-nooih-LEE-noo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Manueline portal is a protected heritage feature, often crowded during peak hours.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na fachada principal da igreja.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH fuh-SHAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the main facade of the church.

responses.english: Good morning, on the main facade of the church.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH fuh-SHAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, na fachada principal da igreja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the donation box is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a caixa de donativos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KEYE-shuh DIH doo-nuh-TEE-voosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Contributions support ongoing restoration of the sacristy and vaults.

likely_response.local: Pode encontrá-la na entrada da igreja.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih ayng-koongt-RAH-LUH NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can find it at the entrance of the church.

responses.english: You can find it at the entrance of the church.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih ayng-koongt-RAH-LUH NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH eeg-REH-zhuh.
responses.local: Pode encontrá-la na entrada da igreja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy the parish booklet
phrases.text_local: Onde se adquire o livreto paroquial?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh seh ad-KWEER-ee oo lee-VREH-too pah-ro-KEE-ow?
phrases.cultural_note: Booklets contain guided routes highlighting the Gravata de Óbidos.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no suporte junto à sacristia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO soo-PAW-ruh-tih ZHOONNG-too AH suhk-reesh-TEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the rack near the sacristy.

responses.english: Good morning, at the rack near the sacristy.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO soo-PAW-ruh-tih ZHOONNG-too AH suhk-reesh-TEEUH.
responses.local: Bom dia, no suporte junto à sacristia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 17th century azulejos are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os azulejos do século XVII?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh DOO SEH-koo-loo dih-zuh-SEH-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: These tiles depict local religious scenes and require careful preservation.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia local ou ao zelador na sacristia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW OW zeh-luh-DOHR NUH suhk-reesh-TEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local guide or the caretaker in the sacristy.

responses.english: Ask the local guide or the caretaker in the sacristy.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW OW zeh-luh-DOHR NUH suhk-reesh-TEEUH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia local ou ao zelador na sacristia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the booklet rack is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o expositor de folhetos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee esh-TAH oo ehs-poh-zee-TOHR deh foh-LYEH-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Folhetos estão disponíveis para consulta gratuita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Manuelino portal is
phrases.text_local: Podem indicar a localização do portal manuelino?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOO poo-ruh-TAHL muh-nooih-LEE-noo?
phrases.cultural_note: This portal exemplifies Portuguese late Gothic architectural evolution.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na entrada frontal externa.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh froong-TAHL ehsh-TEH-ruh-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the external front entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, at the external front entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh froong-TAHL ehsh-TEH-ruh-nuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, na entrada frontal externa.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o escritório da paróquia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW shkree-TAWR-yoo DUH puh-RAW-keeuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao pároco.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW PAH-roo-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or the parish priest.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or the parish priest.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW PAH-roo-koo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao pároco.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a secretaria paroquial?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH sehk-rih-tuh-REEUH puh-roo-KEEAHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão, que a pode encaminhar para a secretaria paroquial.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN, KIH AH PAW-dih ayng-kuh-mee-NYAHR PUH-ruh AH sehk-rih-tuh-REEUH puh-roo-KEEAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan, who can direct you to the parish office.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan, who can direct you to the parish office.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN, KIH AH PAW-dih ayng-kuh-mee-NYAHR PUH-ruh AH sehk-rih-tuh-REEUH puh-roo-KEEAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão, que a pode encaminhar para a secretaria paroquial.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the donation box is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a caixa de donativos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KEYE-shuh DIH doo-nuh-TEE-voosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Donation boxes are common in Portuguese churches, often near the entrance for visitors to contribute.

likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the entrance, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 17th century azulejos are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão expostos os azulejos setecentistas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN ehsh-PAWS-toosh OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh seh-tih-sayng-TEESH-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The tiles feature baroque motifs typical of Óbidos religious art.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia local ou ao sacristão.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW OW suhk-reesh-TOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local guide or the church caretaker.

responses.english: Ask the local guide or the church caretaker.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW OW suhk-reesh-TOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia local ou ao sacristão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baptismal font is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a fonte batismal?
phrases.cultural_note: Historically used for local christening ceremonies since the 16th century.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, near the high altar.

responses.english: Good morning, near the high altar.
